description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a flat roof and multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. The exterior features numerous large, grid-style windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. There is a visible garage with a car parked in the driveway, and the property includes a spacious backyard area with a pool, a circular water tank, and a small outbuilding or shed. The house is predominantly white, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The structure appears to have two main stories, with a rooftop area accessible from the upper floor. The overall design is functional and open, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A large, modern two-story house with flat roofs, expansive windows, a garage, and a backyard with a pool and outbuilding. The design is clean, white, and contemporary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage with a car, and multiple large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat facade, grid windows, and part of the backyard with pool and water tank.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious backyard, pool, circular water tank, and a small outbuilding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the side of the house with additional windows and backyard features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid-style windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, adjacent to a garage and driveway, minimal decorative elements
